acceptance_targets: [chapter_16_prose_001] PASS if no more than two of the cited lines retain the explicit 'then' hinge and at least three cited lines use clearly different sentence shapes. FAIL if the clause-plus-then construction still dominates those beats.

[chapter_16_prose_002] PASS if revised lines 278-316 include at least three explicit internal-experience beats (thought, sensation, memory, or self-assessment) and revised lines 462-490 include at least two, each anchored to the moment's action. FAIL if either span still runs 10+ consecutive paragraphs without interiority.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if no more than two of the cited lines retain the explicit 'then' hinge and at least three cited lines use clearly different sentence shapes. FAIL if the clause-plus-then construction still dominates those beats.
findings.evidence: The same hinge construction (clause + explicit 'then' pivot) recurs as a chapter-level tic at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:19, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:55, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:73, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:211, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:233, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:316, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:448, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:506.
findings.problem: Recurring sentence formula flattens rhythm and signals autopilot prose rather than controlled variation.
findings.rewrite_direction: Recast the repeated-pivot lines at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:19, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:55, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:211, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:316, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:448 with varied sentence architecture (subordination, interruption, or standalone beats) while preserving event order.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised lines 278-316 include at least three explicit internal-experience beats (thought, sensation, memory, or self-assessment) and revised lines 462-490 include at least two, each anchored to the moment's action. FAIL if either span still runs 10+ consecutive paragraphs without interiority.
findings.evidence: Extended exterior-only stretches exceed the 10-paragraph threshold before interiority returns: lunch/social run from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:278 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:316, and post-confession errand run from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:462 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:490.
findings.problem: Interiority drop-out: close-third distance loosens into screenplay-like external coverage for too long, weakening emotional continuity with Anika's focal perspective.
findings.rewrite_direction: Inject focalized internal beats into the cited spans, especially around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:294, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:314, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:468, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:484, tying each beat to immediate dialogue/action rather than retrospective summary.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into uncomfortable specificity when it changes behavior: pain detail, debt arithmetic, manipulative care, and mixed motives. In edge cases, prefer the truest in-character action over protective narration, then carry the real consequence forward instead of immediately moralizing it away.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If coercion, grief, injury, or economic shame appears, language must stay specific and embodied; vague softening triggers mandatory rewrite.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for formal authority, deliberate emphasis, or emotional freezing.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count and dialogue density chapter to chapter: rotate match compression, slow inventory aftermath, institutional pressure scenes, and quiet domestic intervals so adjacent chapters do not share the same structural pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete contemporary diction with class-aware specificity; avoid abstract therapy language unless a character would actually use it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored in Anika for most chapters, with brief controlled slips toward Ravi in designated confrontation and aftermath chapters.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate clipped athletic sequences with longer reflective cadences; sentence length should track exertion, shame, and release.
